global.under_maintenance_message: We're currently performing scheduled maintenance to improve your experience.
global.under_maintenance_description: Please check back later. We apologize for any inconvenience.

global.error_occured_analysis: There was an error while generating graphs
global.injector_activity_directions: Please fill the contrast and saline syringes individually with the appropriate volumes necessary to perform this {bodyPartName} examination. Once the volumes have been chosen, select the "NEXT" button to proceed.
global.name: Name
global.patient_position_directions: Please select the patient position that you would like in order to perform this {bodyPartName} examination. Once the position has been chosen, select the "NEXT" button to proceed.
global.patient_landmarking_directions: Using the laser and navigation buttons, please move the patient and table to the position that you wish to landmark them in for localization within this {bodyPartName} examination and select "Confirm Landmark". Once the landmark has been chosen, select the "NEXT" button to proceed.
global.policy_agreement: By registering, you agree to the Privacy Policy & Terms and Conditions
global.question: Question
global.retrying_answer_submission_check_network: Retrying answer submission... Check your network connection...
global.check_webgl_description: Seems your browser does not support WebGL. Use the link below to resolve this issue.
global.expiry_alert_title: Your registration code is about to expire
global.expiry_alert_text: Your registration code is expiring soon ({daysValue} days left). After expiration, you will no longer have access to your account. Please reach out to your cohort manager or instructor to learn how to get extended access.
global.patient_position_is_incorrect: Your chosen patient position is incorrect.  Please make your next selection from possible patient positions listed below.

global.set_scan_description: If you wish to use the “Set Delay” method for Determining phase timing, Please insert the  scan delay into the desired questions manually.

prepared_exam.chrome_use_latest: Use the latest version of Google Chrome. Download Chrome
prepared_exam.close_other_tabs: Close all other browser tabs and programs for optimal performance.
prepared_exam.stable_internet_recommended: A stable internet connection is recommended. Test speed
prepared_exam.mouse_recommended: Make sure that you are using a mouse. We do not recommend using a trackpad.
prepared_exam.review_policies: Before beginning the Skills Assessment, we recommend opening our ScanLab Policies in a new tab by clicking the "{policiesLink}" link. You will need to refer to our ScanLab Policies on how to approach key clinical variables—such as age, lab values, port access, contrast reactions, pregnancy considerations, and renal insufficiencies.
prepared_exam.review_policies_tip: Be sure to review our {policiesLink} in Step 5 above before starting.
prepared_exam.understand_proceed: I understand the skill assessment functionality and wish to proceed
prepared_exam.select_vendor_ui: Please Select Your Preferred MRI Manufacturer and Software Level from the available options
prepared_exam.to_troubleshoot: to configure google chrome for better performance
prepared_exam.software_options: Select vendor and software level of your choosing

ScanButton.slicing_not_possible_with_only_localizer: Sorry, only Localizer data is loaded. Slicing is not possible without more data.
ScanButton.tooltip_move_shortcut: The 'm' keyboard key can also be used to move the patient as long as the key is pressed
ScanButton.tooltip_start_shortcut: The spacebar key can also be used to start the acquisition. This is commonly used to start the acquisition at the same time as the start of injection

CriticalThinkingManager.delete_question_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this question?

FAQ.doesnt_run_well_question: What should I try if Scanlab doesn't run well on my computer?

Home.select_region_description: Pick a region on the next screen that you'd like to get tested on.
Home.no_testable_body_parts: No body parts are currently available to test. Please contact your cohort manager if you believe this is unexpected.

MRI.abandon_description: All unanswered questions will be given a score of 0
MRI.sandbox_dialog_body: This exam is in sandbox mode. You may go through this exam as often as you like and the results will not go towards your overall score.

MRIScoreLine.select_items_here: Select items here to be shown on the graph

NavBar.feedback_textarea_placeholder: Please give as much detail for your feedback here as possible. This may also include concerns about some of our exam questions, if applicable.
NavBar.having_issues_text: Having issues? Refer to the {faqLink} section before reporting for more information

Profile.default_injector_protocol_contrast_only: Default Injector Protocol for Contrast only
Profile.default_injector_protocol_contrast_and_s: Default Injector Protocol for Contrast + Saline
Profile.scientific_mode_not_enabled: Scientific Mode is not enabled for this cohort
Profile.scientific_mode_tooltip: Scientific Mode enables advanced imaging features like TSE Blur simulation. Note: Enabling these features may add additional processing time during scanning.

Register.logout_to_register: Logout to register as a new user

StudentManager.select_student_to_view_scores: Select a student from the Students tab to view their scores.
StudentManager.individual_settings_help: Each chip links to that section of the student's individual settings. Green means individual settings are configured for this student; red means the cohort's defaults are used.

CriticalThinkingPrompt.video_instructions_0: Click "Start Contrast Fluoro" to begin the contrast fluoro sequence.
CriticalThinkingPrompt.video_instructions_1: Click "Stop Fluoro / Start Scan" when appropriate to begin acquiring data in k-space.
CriticalThinkingPrompt.video_instructions_2: Warning: Once "Start Contrast Fluoro" has been selected the sequence cannot be paused.
CriticalThinkingPrompt.point_select_instructions_0: Click anywhere to select your answer.

RegionSelection.select_region_description: Click on the body part in the region in which you would like to be tested.

CohortManager.could_not_find_user: We couldn't find a user with that email address.
CohortManager.special_managers_get_out: This is the special Managers cohort. To invite managers, go back to the registration codes tab. This managers tab is not used for the special Managers cohort, because they would be the managers of the managers.
CohortManager.teaching_mode_refresh_hint: Students already logged in will need to refresh their browser for this setting to take effect.
CohortManager.number_of_days_until_expiration: Number of days until code expires
CohortManager.active_days_length: Number of days from activation date until code expires
CohortManager.overwrite_cohort_student_settings: Overwrite Cohort Settings for this Student

Scores.my_scores_description: Pellentesque dapibus suscipit ligula.  Donec posuere augue in quam.  Etiam vel tortor sodales tellus ultricies commodo.  Suspendisse potenti.  Aenean in sem ac leo mollis blandit.  Donec neque quam, dignissim in, mollis nec, sagittis eu, wisi.  Phasellus lacus.

CombinedTestResults.summary2: Please review your answers and feedback below. You may also return to region selection to start a new examination.

CohortsStudent.no_mris: This student hasn't completed any MRI tests.
CohortsStudent.no_cts: This student hasn't completed any CT tests.
CohortsStudent.no_critical_thinking: This student hasn't answered any critical thinking questions.

ScreeningForm.currently_on_hydroxyurea: Are you currently taking a medication known as Hydroxyurea?
ScreeningForm.currently_on_metformin: Are you currently taking a medication known as Metformin or Glucophage?
ScreeningForm.hormones: Are you currently on any kind of hormone therapy?
ScreeningForm.interfere_warning: The following items can interfere with an MRI examination. Do you have the following items? Check yes or no for each.

ApiKeys.regenerate_api_key_warning: The old API key will become invalid and stop working immediately.
ApiKeys.how_to_use: How to Use Your API Key
ApiKeys.auth_header: Include your API key in the X-API-Key header of your HTTP requests:
ApiKeys.note_secure: Keep your API key secure and never share it publicly
ApiKeys.note_https: Always use HTTPS when making API requests
ApiKeys.note_expires: API keys expire after 1 year - you'll need to regenerate them
ApiKeys.note_deactivate: You can deactivate or delete API keys at any time if compromised

TermsAndConditions.terms_and_conditions_of_use_description: This Web site, www.scanlabmr.com, is owned and operated by MediSim Technologies, LLC, a Florida Limited Liability Company (“MST,” “we,” “our,” and “us”). Throughout these terms and conditions of use, the words “you” and “your” refer to the user visiting the Site. These terms and conditions of use (“Terms of Use”) set forth the legally binding terms for your use of the Site. By accessing or using this Site in any manner, you signify your agreement to: (i) these Terms of Use, (ii) our Privacy Policy (the “Privacy Policy”), and (iii) any other legal notices, conditions or guidelines located within the Site. These Terms of Use apply to our Web site or any other MST online service or application that posts a link to these Terms of Use, as well as any features, widgits, plug-ins, content, downloads or other services that are offered, or such other MST online service or application (collectively, the “Site”). These Terms of Use will apply regardless of how you access or use the Site, whether it be via computer, tablet, mobile device, smart watch, console, or otherwise. any mobile applications that post a link to this page. If you do not agree to any of these Terms of Use or the Privacy Policy, please do not use the Site and exit now.
TermsAndConditions.the_terms_and_conditions_of_MST: The terms and conditions of MST’s
TermsAndConditions.important_legal_information_about_privac: apply to your use of the Site, form an integral part of your agreement with us, and are incorporated by reference into these Terms of Use. You should read the Privacy Policy carefully before you use our Site since, by using the Site, you will be agreeing to everything in these Terms of Use, including the terms contained in our Privacy Policy.
TermsAndConditions.modification_to_these_terms: Modification to These Terms of Use and Our Site
TermsAndConditions.modification_to_these_terms_description: We may add to, update, delete from or modify the Site at any time in our sole discretion. We reserve the right, at any time and from time to time, for any reason, to change the Terms of Use. We may post or display notices of changes to the Terms of Use on the Site or may notify you of such changes. Once posted, these changes to the Terms of Use become effective immediately. If any change that we make is not acceptable to you, promptly stop using the Site. Any use by you of the Site after any changes to our Terms of Use become effective will signify your agreement to those changes. You should check back regularly and review these Terms of Use so that you are aware of the most current rights and obligations that apply to your agreement with us. Nothing in these Terms of Use confers any third-party rights or benefits to you.
TermsAndConditions.access_and_use_description: These Terms of Use apply to all users of the Site. We provide the Site Content (defined below) as a courtesy to our users and intend it for general, informational and educational purposes only. All information from this Site is subject to change without notice. We permit you to access and use the Site Content for personal, non-commercial purposes only and hereby give you permission to download and print Site Content for the sole purposes of viewing, reading, and retaining the materials for non-commercial, educational use. Any other copying, distribution, retransmission, or modification of Site Content, whether in electronic or other form, is prohibited without our express prior written permission. You agree that you will not disassemble, decompile, reverse engineer or otherwise modify the Site Content, any material on this Site or the Site software. Any unauthorized or prohibited use may subject the offender to civil liability and criminal prosecution under applicable laws.
TermsAndConditions.user_accounts_description1: To use certain features of the Site you may need to create a personal username and password. If required for a feature of the Site, MST will generate a password for you and you will then be prompted to create a user name and password. You are responsible for any interaction with the Site that takes place through your personal account, regardless of whether such use is unauthorized or by a third party. Please keep your username and password secure and do not let anyone else use your account information to access the Site.
TermsAndConditions.user_accounts_description2: User accounts are to be used only by the individual who has purchased the license or by the individual a company has assigned to a single license code. ScanLab licenses are not permitted to be shared for multiple use. A ScanLab license is not permitted to be used as a means of educational presentation or instruction without the expressed written permission of ScanLab. Any violations of these terms will result in legal action and immediate termination of use and services.
TermsAndConditions.eligibility_description: You must be at least 18 years old to use the Site. By using the Site, you affirm that you are 18 years of age or older and are fully able and competent to enter into the terms, conditions, obligations, affirmations, representations, and warranties set forth in these Terms of Use, and to abide by and comply with these Terms of Use.

You in no way will obtain any ownership interest or rights in the Site Content or Marks contained on this Site. MST reserves all rights not expressly granted in and to the Site and the Site Content. If you download or print a copy of the Site Content for personal or educational use, you must retain all copyright and other proprietary notices contained therein. You agree not to circumvent, disable or otherwise interfere with any security related features of the Site or features that prevent or restrict use or copying of any Site Content or enforce limitations on use of the Site or the Site Content.
TermsAndConditions.indemnification_description: By accessing the Site, you agree to indemnify us and any parent, subsidiary or affiliated entities, and respective directors, officers, employees, agents and consultants, and hold them harmless from any and all claims and expenses, including attorney’s fees, arising from your use of the Site or your violation of any term of these Terms of Use.

Reliance on any Site Content is done so entirely at your own risk with no liability to MST. You assume the entire cost of all necessary servicing, repair or correction to any equipment you use to access the Site. To the extent that applicable law may not allow the exclusion of implied warranties, the above exclusions may not apply to you.
TermsAndConditions.disclaimer_description2: Site Content, documents, information, graphics and other materials appearing on the Site may include technical inaccuracies, miscalculations, typographical errors, and out-of-date information and use of such documents, information, graphics or other materials is at your own risk.
TermsAndConditions.limitation_of_liability_description: To the fullest extent permissible pursuant to applicable law, MST shall not be liable for any damages (including, but not limited to, direct, indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages), whether based on warranty, contract, tort, or any other legal theory, including, but not limited to, damages for loss of data or other damage to any other intangible property (even if MST has been advised of the possibility of such damages) resulting from: (i) the use or inability to use this Site; or (ii) the disclosure of, unauthorized access to, or alteration of any transmission or data.
TermsAndConditions.links_to_other_websites: Links to Other Websites and Services
TermsAndConditions.links_to_other_websites_description: To the extent that the Site contains links to other Web sites and outside services and resources, we do not control the availability and content of those Web sites, services or resources, nor do we necessarily review or endorse materials available at or through such other Web sites. Viewing other Web sites or utilizing outside services and resources is at your own risk. Accordingly, we encourage you to be aware when you leave our Site and to read the terms, conditions and privacy policy of each Web site that you visit. We shall not be liable for any loss or damage caused or allegedly caused by or in connection with use of or reliance on any content, goods or services available on or through any such Web site or resource.
TermsAndConditions.other_restrictions_on_conduct_descriptio: You must provide true and accurate information to our Site. You are prohibited from misrepresenting your information or tampering with our Site. You agree not to disrupt, modify or interfere with the functioning of our Site or any services provided on or through it. You further agree not to disrupt, modify or interfere with any software, hardware or servers associated with our Site, and you agree not to impede or interfere with others’ use of our Site. You also agree not to alter or tamper with any information or materials on, or associated with, our Site or services provided on or through it.
TermsAndConditions.governing_law_description: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the State of Florida. Any claim or dispute between you and MST that arises in whole or in part from your use of the Site shall be decided exclusively by the federal or state courts residing in Orange County, Florida. You hereby stipulate to the fairness and convenience of proceedings in such courts for all disputes arising out of or relating to the use of the Site. These Terms of Use, together with the Privacy Policy, and any other documents or polices referenced herein constitute the entire agreement between you and MST regarding the use of the Site and the content and services provided on the Site.
TermsAndConditions.severability_and_enforceability_descript: If any provision or portion of these Terms of Use is held illegal, invalid, or unenforceable (in whole or in part) it will not affect the legality, validity or enforceability of any other provisions or portions of these Terms of Use and will be modified to the minimum extent necessary to correct any deficiencies or replaced with a provision which is as close as is legally permissible to the provision found invalid or unenforceable.
TermsAndConditions.termination_and_exclusion_description: We reserve the right, in our sole discretion, to revoke any and all privileges associated with accessing and/or using the Site, and to take any other action we deem appropriate. We may terminate or suspend your use of the Site, for no reason or any reason whatsoever, including improper use of this Site or failure to comply with these Terms of Use.
TermsAndConditions.general_description1: We may assign, novate or subcontract any or all of our rights and obligations under these Terms of Use at any time.
TermsAndConditions.general_description2: You acknowledge and agree that any questions, testimonials, comments, suggestions, ideas or other information provided by you to MST shall become the sole property of us, with no obligation of confidentiality. MST shall be entitled to the unrestricted use and dissemination of these submissions for any purpose, commercial or otherwise without any acknowledgement of or compensation to you.
TermsAndConditions.terms_end_info1: If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Use, please contact MST at:

Privacy.intro: This Web site www.ScanLabMr.com is owned and operated by MediSim Technologies, LLC, a Florida Limited Liability Company ("{mst}," "{we}," "{our}," and "{us}"). This Privacy Policy applies to our Web site or any other MST online service or application that posts a link to this Privacy Policy, as well as any features, widgets, plug-ins, content, downloads or other services that are offered, or such other MST online service or application (collectively, the "Site"). This Privacy Policy will apply regardless of how you access or use the Site, whether it be via computer, tablet, mobile device, smart watch, console, or otherwise. By accessing our Site, you consent to this Privacy Policy and our {termsLink}, including our collection, use, and sharing of your information, as described below. If you do not agree to these Terms of Use or our Privacy Policy, please exit our Site. If you have any questions regarding our policies or your use of our Site, please contact us at {email}
Privacy.information_we_collect_description: We collect information from you in several ways, including when you choose to share information with us by entering it on our Site, through the postings that you may make, and by using automated processes.
Privacy.information_you_provide_description: We may ask you and you may choose to provide certain personal information to us, such as your first and last name, e-mail address, mailing address, and telephone number. We may collect this information in various places, including through our register and login pages, “Contact Us” page, or in other parts of our Site.
Privacy.automated_information_collection_descrip: We may automatically collect certain information when you visit or use our Site. This information may include your IP address (or other unique device identifier, including one that we may assign); certain details about your browser, operating system, and hardware; your location, if available; the URL that referred you to our Site; your activities on our Site, including your preferences; and other logging information, such as the date and time of your visit. We may use a variety of tracking technologies to automatically collect information, such as cookies, web beacons, embedded scripts, browser fingerprinting, GPS, iBeacons, and ETags (or “entity tags”). A cookie (or “locally shared object”) is a data file placed on your device when you visit our Site. Your browser, or other software (including Adobe Flash), may allow you to reject or remove cookies, but if you do so, some features of our Site may not work properly, and we may not be able to remember your preferences the next time that you visit. We may also use web server logs to collect and store information about Site usage. When you visit our Site from a mobile device, like a smartphone, we may also collect additional information from your device, including your location, device identifier, and information about your mobile network.
Privacy.user_accounts_description: To use certain features of the Site you may need to create a personal username and password. You are responsible for any interaction with the Site that takes place through your personal account, regardless of whether such use is unauthorized or by a third party. Please keep your username and password secure and do not let anyone else use your account information to access the Site.
Privacy.analytics_services_description: Our Site uses third-party analytics services, including, but not necessarily limited to, Google Analytics. These services may track details about your online activities over time and across different sites. These services help us to improve our Site. These services may also allow us to provide you with targeted advertisements or other content that you may be interested in based on your online activities. You can learn more about Google Analytics and your choices at this link. If you would like to learn more about targeted ads that may be based on your online activities (and the choices that you may exercise for certain sites and advertisers) you may wish to visit the {networkAdvertisingLink} or the {digitalAdvertisingLink} Web sites. To opt out of being tracked by Google Analytics across all Web sites, visit: {googleOptOutLink}.
Privacy.how_we_use_the_information: How We Use the Information That We Collect
Privacy.how_we_use_the_information_description: We use the information that we collect from you to provide you with the services requested as well as provide you information that may be of interest to you, such as services information, newsletters, and special offers. We may also use the information that we collect to customize your experience on our Site, to provide customer support, and to enforce our Terms of Use.
Privacy.how_and_when_we_share_information: How and When We Share Information with Third Parties
Privacy.how_and_when_we_share_information_descri: We may share the information that we collect with third parties for a variety of purposes. For example, we may share information with your school, institution or employer and with service providers who assist us in our business operations. We may also share information where required by law or to satisfy any applicable law, regulation, subpoena, government request, or other legal process. We may also share information with third parties, including law enforcement, to protect our Site and to enforce our Terms of Use. We also reserve the right to share the information that we collect with our subsidiaries and affiliates and with any subsequent owner in the event of a merger, consolidation, sale of our assets, or other change in our business.
Privacy.co_branded_areas_description: We may provide certain parts of our Site in association with third parties, such as promotional partners. These “co-branded areas” will identify the third party. If you choose to use these co-branded areas, we may share your information with the identified third party, and that third party may also collect information from you, in addition to the information that we collect, as described above. You should review the privacy policies of those identified third parties to understand how they collect and use information.
Privacy.links_to_third_party_sites_description: Our Site may include links to third-party Web sites or other online services. We are not responsible for these other Web sites and services, and they may collect and use information about you. You should review the privacy policies for such third parties before using their Web sites or services to understand how they collect and use information.
Privacy.third_party_tracking_and_do_not_track: Third-Party Tracking and Do Not Track
Privacy.third_party_tracking_and_do_not_track_de: Third parties may use tracking technologies in connection with our Site, which may include the collection of information about your online activities over time and across third-party websites. This Privacy Policy does not apply to these third-party technologies because we may not control them and we are not responsible for them. Do Not Track is a technology that enables users to opt out of tracking by Web sites they do not visit. Currently, we do not monitor or take any action with respect to Do Not Track technology.
Privacy.updating_your_information_description: Our Site may allow you to update the information that we collect from you, such as the contact information. You may also request that we update your information by sending an e-mail to us at {emailLink}. Our Site may also allow you to update your e-mail preferences.
Privacy.how_we_protect_your_information_descript: We use commercially reasonable and industry standard security technologies and safeguards to protect the information that we collect and use. We also expect our service providers to protect information in the same manner. No data transmission over the Internet, mobile networks, wireless transmission or electronic storage of information can, however, be guaranteed 100% secure. Please note that we cannot guarantee the security of any information you transmit to us.
Privacy.transfer_of_information_to_the_united_st: Transfer of Information to the United States

If you are from a non-U.S. country, please be aware that the personal information you submit, including information provided through our Site, is being sent to a location in the United States. The data protection laws in the United States may differ from those of the country in which you are located, and your personal information may be subject to access requests from governments, courts, or law enforcement in the United States according to laws of the United States. By providing such personal information, you are consenting to (and represent that you have authority to consent to), the transfer of such information to the United States for the uses and purposes described in this Privacy Policy.
Privacy.children_privacy_description: Our Site is intended for general audiences, and we do not knowingly seek or collect personal information from children under the age of 18. In accordance with the Child Online Privacy Protection Act, in the event that we learn that we have collected personal information from a child under age 13 without verification of parental consent, we will delete that information as quickly as possible. If you believe that we might have any personal information from or about a child, please contact us at {emailLink}.
Privacy.privacy_policy_changes_description: We reserve the right to change this Privacy Policy at any time and we will post notice of any such changes on our Site. Your use of our Site after the effective date constitutes your acceptance of the amended terms and conditions. We reserve the right to apply the amended terms to the information that we have already collected, subject to any legal constraints.
Privacy.contact_us_description: If you have any questions regarding our Privacy Policy, practices, or your use of our Site, please contact us at {emailLink} or using the information below:
